message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.fillna basic

Append a live-pandas oracle test (live_oracle_series_fillna_basic)
to fp-conformance's existing live_oracle_dataframe_series_core
suite. Uses the same packet-fixture pattern the rest of the file
follows: build a PacketFixture in-place, dispatch to the live
pandas legacy oracle (with allow_system_pandas_fallback=false so
the test fails closed if no legacy oracle is configured),
compare_series_expected the result.

Coverage
--------
The new case feeds a 4-element float64 series with two of the four
values nulled out (sparse: [1.0, NaN, 3.0, NaN]) and pins
Series.fillna with the canonical scalar fill value. Asserts the
returned series matches pandas' fillna output element-for-element
including dtype preservation and index alignment.

Sister to the recently-landed clip and astype live oracle cases
in this file (commits 21e8708 and d1c2dd2). 224 lines of pure
test scaffolding; no source under src/ touched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
